title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Verify user can log in and log out via App Settings > General > Account, with correct UI states before and after.
steps: Tap Continue and log in with credentials
Verify 'Your account' text with Name and Email fields populated
Verify a login dialog with Cancel and Continue options appears
Verify user is logged out, 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and Log in button is visible
expected: User can log in successfully, see their account info (Name and Email fields populated), then log out and see the login dialog with Cancel and Continue options. After tapping Continue, user is logged out, sees "You aren't currently logged in" text, and the Log in button is visible.
